title: So what do you guys think Evangelion Final will be called
display_title: So what do you guys think Evangelion Final will be called
wikitext:
[]: So, what do you guys think Evangelion: Final will be called? Post by TheMarauder » Tue Feb 07, 2012 2:40 am Personally, my bet is on Evangelion: 4.0 You Can (Not) Understand . Kaworu says something to this effect while descending into Terminal Dogma in Episode 24, and I just figured that it fit the series of films well. That, or it will just be called Evangelion: Final , and I am totally wrong.

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Tue Feb 07, 2012 3:39 am Evangelion: Final: We Are (Not) Kidding Evangelion 4.0: You Get (No) Refunds Evangelion: One More Final: I (Don't) Need You Evageeks.org: We Lock List Threads (Seriously)

[]: Post by qu4d » Tue Feb 07, 2012 4:20 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: Evangelion: One More Final: I (Don't) Need You

[]: Post by robersora » Tue Feb 07, 2012 4:39 am Has anyone out there guessed the title for 3.0 right? EVA Final: you must (not) die EVA Final: this will (not) end EVA Final: You will (not) cry EVA Final: Shikinami is (not) Makinami

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 07, 2012 10:53 am We do (Not) have a thread already: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/11010/Speculation-International-Alternate-Titles-for-Q-and-Final/
